title: Patient Services Representative
description: As a Patient Services Representative at Mayo Clinic, you'll be the welcoming face for our patients, helping them navigate their healthcare journey with compassion and efficiency.
responsibilities: Welcome and register patients while maintaining a warm, professional environment
Verify insurance information and explain coverage details to patients
Schedule appointments and coordinate with clinical teams
Handle patient inquiries and concerns with empathy and expertise
Maintain accurate patient records and follow HIPAA protocols
Support clinical staff with administrative tasks and patient flow

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
